_doc: Character manifest for agent portrait generation. See character-guide.md and generate-image.py.
_master_template: masterpiece, best quality, {character_block}, 90retrostyle, retro artstyle, anime screencap, anime coloring, cel shading, soft lighting, muted colors, dark background, portrait, upper body
_diversity_note: Demographics proportional to the Americas (~1B people): 34% White/European (10), 23% Mestizo (7), 16% Black/Afro-descendant (5), 10% Multiracial/Pardo (3), 8% Indigenous (2), 6% Asian (2), 3% Other (1). Skin tags placed FIRST in prompt_block. Gender tag also in prompt_block.
_negative_dark_skin: For dark/very dark skin characters, add to negative: pale skin, white skin, light skin

characters.name: V
characters.prompt_block: 1boy, (dark skin:1.3), dark-skinned_male, wild flowing purple hair with braided sections, intense piercing eyes, purple rim lighting, dramatic confident pose, leather jacket with neon trim, strong jawline, cyberpunk poet
